statement.p: Last year, Joan received a {2\%} raise. This year, she received a {1\%} raise. Her current wage is {\$10} an hour. What was her wage before the two raises?

solution.p: We can represent this situation with the equation: x \cdot (1 + 0.02) \cdot (1 + 0.01) = 10\text{.} Solve this equation for x\text{.}
